FX.title: [USD/JPY] FLAT: AI Detects Geopolitical Risk Weighing on Risk Sentiment Amid Mixed APAC Fundamentals
tldr_points: AUD weakness from Australian inflation overshoot pressures APAC risk sentiment
Trump's Iran blockade signals heightened geopolitical risk, traditionally JPY positive
PBOC's CNY fixing suggests mild CNY strengthening, offsetting some USD components
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY trades sideways as geopolitical risk tempers risk appetite and APAC fundamentals show divergence.
FX.comment: Range-bound trading amid geopolitical risk and mixed APAC fundamentals

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI-Driven Tech Momentum and Industrial Strength Support Bullish Bias
tldr_points: Tech sector momentum from OpenAI-related catalysts driving index higher
Industrial names showing mixed signals with selective strength in cyclicals
Utility sector facing headwinds as Morgan Stanley downgrades Edison International
Key technical levels under observation; momentum favors upside
STOCKS.excerpt: AI momentum and industrial resilience support S&P 500 upside despite sector rotation
STOCKS.comment: AI momentum and industrial resilience support bullish bias; buy on dips toward MA20

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: AI Detects Indecision Amid Mixed Catalyst Environment
tldr_points: Liquidity depth remains robust though chop persists
Key levels hover around MA20 and RSI 14 near neutral
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD likely to remain range‑bound as catalysts surface but do not breach key technical barriers.
CRYPTO.comment: Price around MA20 with neutral RSI; sideward momentum inevitable
